description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior is clad in gray brick or concrete, with large, regularly spaced windows on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade features a central entrance with a dark awning and a large window above, flanked by smaller windows on either side. The side elevations have a more minimal window arrangement, with narrow vertical windows and fewer openings. The rear of the building mirrors the front in window arrangement but lacks a main entrance. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on symmetry and practicality.
description: A modern, three-story apartment building with a gray brick exterior, large windows, and a flat roof. The design is symmetrical and functional, with a central entrance and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a dark awning, a large central window above, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows on three floors.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a narrow facade with vertically aligned windows and minimal detailing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a similar window arrangement to the front but without an entrance, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
description_view_3: The right side view features a few tall, narrow windows and a mostly solid wall, highlighting the building's utilitarian design.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across all facades, with consistent spacing and alignment on each floor. The front and rear have larger windows, while the sides feature narrower, vertically oriented windows.
